title: Bullying - Canada.ca
content:
Find information on how to recognize and prevent bullying. Also learn about bullying prevention programs.

## Services and information

### How to recognize bullying
Find information on how to recognize bullying and how to talk to children about stopping it.

### Bullying (ages 4 to 11)
Learn about when and how the cycle of bullying begins. Also find information on how to help prevent childhood bullying.

### Bullying (ages 12 to 17)
Learn about the dangers and signs of adolescent bullying. Also find advice for teenagers who are being bullied.

### How parents and guardians can prevent bullying
Learn about the role a parent or guardian plays in preventing bullying. Also learn how to help stop bullying once it starts.

### Bullying prevention programs
Find information on successful bullying intervention methods at both the community and school level.
